R

register(String, String, File) - Static method in class authentication.Register
Registers a new user by saving their usernames and passwords, copying a profile image, and setting up a personal directory with log and game data.
Register - Class in authentication
Saves user credentials, stores a profile image, and prepares the user's directory structure.
Register() - Constructor for class authentication.Register
 
registerGUI - Static variable in class main.MainGUI
 
RegisterGUI - Class in authentication
Register screen panel for new user sign-up.
RegisterGUI() - Constructor for class authentication.RegisterGUI
Constructs the RegisterGUI interface with the main frame.
reset() - Method in class game.Game
Resets the game objects and stops timers.
resetPlayer() - Static method in class home.Home
Resets the current player to null.
resetScoreHealth() - Method in class player.Player
Resets the health and score variables
resetTimers() - Method in class knowledge_keepers.KnowledgeKeepers
Stops all timers related to movement and attacks, and clears any active Informations and Questions.
